goal: Extend the identification line (see plans/prd_identify_done.json) along the two directions that survived the novelty review: (1) the LEAKAGE FRONTIER - leakage-freeness is a (model x market x period) property, not a property of data alone; a China-trained LLM may have memorized A-shares, flipping the leakage-validity test, so the substrate that identifies one model's contribution may be contaminated for another; (2) the DE-BIASING ESTIMATOR as a standalone, broadly-useful methods contribution that corrects contaminated LLM-finance benchmark scores via a leakage-free anchor market. Contribution = measurement/identification, NOT alpha (the weak-signal/null findings stand).
env: Use .venv-xpu. Reuse src/identify/* (leakage_validity, contribution, debias), src/eval_e3/* (run_llm, ashare_probe), results/poc_full + results/poc_wf_split* (existing gemini scores, $0), results/e3_*/ (FinBen + A-share).
preconditions: NOVELTY CHECK FIRST (meta-lesson: C1-C5 mostly collided). Before any PAID task, run a novelty check on (a) per-model / model-relative LLM-finance memorization and (b) cross-market de-biasing of contaminated benchmarks. Do these interactively (web), NOT as loop tasks. Paid tasks stay skip:true until novelty + cost approved.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes
Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed stats.json, findings (incl. nulls) recorded, never gated (SIGN-R1)
No new LLM spend unless the task is explicitly un-skipped after approval (SIGN-R2)
Every identified estimate carries a clustered CI + a per-(model,data) leakage-validity check (SIGN-R3)

tasks.title: Multi-model probe harness (no-context + full, model sweep)
tasks.rationale: Generalize ashare_probe/run_llm to sweep a list of models, producing per-model no-context AND full-context directional accuracy + clustered CI on a given anchor set. Foundation for the leakage frontier.
acceptanceCriteria: probe_accuracy(preds_df, pred_col, target_col, date_col) returns acc + clustered CI (reuse onset_eval)
a model-sweep runner accepts a model list and an anchor set and writes per-model results; the LLM-calling part is injectable/mockable so the test is hermetic (no network)
hermetic smoke test mocks the LLM and checks the per-model table shape + CI keys
tasks.notes: Reuse src/eval_e3/run_llm (call_llm, parse) + src/evaluation/onset_eval. Make the scorer injectable for hermetic testing.

tasks.title: Leakage-frontier aggregator (model x market x period grid)
tasks.rationale: For each (model, market, period) cell: leakage_validity (ID1) + identified contribution (ID2) -> a grid showing where the substrate is leakage-free AND where contribution is (non)zero. The 'leakage-free frontier of LLM financial skill'.
acceptanceCriteria: build_frontier(cells) where each cell has (no_context_acc, no_context_ci, baseline, llm, target, dates) -> validity + contribution per cell
emits a table + a figure (paper/sections/figures/leakage_frontier.png)
hermetic smoke on synthetic cells; figure code guarded so the test does not require display

tasks.title: REAL ($0): scale gemini identification to full WF anchors x horizons
tasks.rationale: Map WHERE (if anywhere) the gemini LLM contribution is non-zero: all ~6000 poc_wf scored anchors x available horizons. Dense check of the ID3 null.
acceptanceCriteria: uses results/poc_wf_split{1,2,3}/predictions.parquet (existing raw/expert scores) + LGBM baseline + multiple targets if present (e.g. _fwd_r5 and any other horizon columns)
writes results/identify/scaled/stats.json: per-(split,horizon,signal) identified contribution + clustered CI + leakage validity
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + committed; finding recorded
$0 new LLM cost
tasks.notes: Depends LF/ID2. If only one horizon exists, report that; do not fabricate horizons.

tasks.title: De-biasing estimator: assumptions + sensitivity analysis
tasks.rationale: Harden DB1 into a defensible methods contribution: state the calibration assumption formally, and bound the correction's sensitivity to chance, calibration market, and the clean-market-at-chance assumption.
acceptanceCriteria: sensitivity(us_full, us_nocontext, clean_full, clean_nocontext, grid) sweeps chance and calibration error, returning the range of the de-biased estimate
flags when the correction is fragile (clean market not at chance, or sign ambiguity)
hermetic test on synthetic

tasks.title: REAL ($0): apply de-biasing across a curated benchmark table
tasks.rationale: Produce the methods-paper table: de-biased reasoning-only estimates for our FinBen results plus any literature-reported (full, no-context-proxy) pairs supplied by a human in a curated JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/e3_*/leakage_summary.json (ours) + an optional data/debias_literature.json (human-curated lit numbers; absent -> just ours)
writes results/identify/debias/benchmark_table.json + a markdown table
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + committed
$0 new LLM cost
tasks.notes: Depends DBX1. Literature numbers must be human-supplied (do not invent).

tasks.title: Synthesis: leakage-frontier figure + de-biasing methods table
tasks.rationale: Aggregate ID-SCALE + DBX2 (+ LF3 if run) into results/identify/frontier_summary.md + figure for the paper.
acceptanceCriteria: reads the available results/identify/* artifacts and writes frontier_summary.md + paper/sections/figures/leakage_frontier_summary.png
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + committed

tasks.title: (PAID, SKIP) Multi-model A-share leakage frontier - run real probes
tasks.rationale: Run LF1/LF2 for real across {gemini, a Chinese model (Qwen/DeepSeek/GLM), sonnet, ...}: no-context + full on A-shares. Tests whether a China-trained LLM FAILS the A-share leakage-validity (memorized A-shares) -> leakage-freeness is model-relative.
acceptanceCriteria: runs the multi-model probe on A-share anchors + identification per model; writes results/identify/frontier/multi_model.json
REQUIRES new LLM API calls across several models -> cost; needs the models to be available on the Cloubic endpoint
hermetic smoke (mocked) green
tasks.skipReason: Paid (multi-model LLM scoring) + depends on model availability on Cloubic. Flip skip:false ONLY after the novelty check confirms the model-relative-leakage angle is novel AND cost is approved.
